content.en:
Soon.

The old mountain transferred the prepared resources and treasure land to the Terran Holy Kingdom.

It was also from this incident that the reputation of the Terran Holy Kingdom began to spread in the surrounding territories, and some middle-level forces also knew about the Terran Holy Kingdom.

But the more than a hundred powerful forces in the Eastern Wu Realm naturally don't care about a single Terran Holy Country, even if the strength of the Terran Holy Kingdom is comparable to some medium-sized forces, they will not be taken seriously.

After all, any powerful force has more than one Eternal Realm God Realm mid-level powerhouse, and some even have an Eternal Realm God Realm mid-level peak powerhouse that condenses six Eternal Realm spirits.

Therefore, any powerful force placed in the Eternal Realm is an unimaginable existence, but it is not worth mentioning in the Realm God Realm.

Of course.

It is impossible for these powerful forces to go to the Eternal Realm, after all, the resources of the Eternal Realm are still too poor, and almost all the resources have to rely on the Eternal Realm that has been carved out, and the resources in other places are too scarce to support the expenses of a powerful force.

......

Terran Holy Country.

After Ye Tian learned in 26 that the old mountains had given resources and treasure lands to the Terran Holy Kingdom, he arranged for some Terrans to accept those treasure lands.

With those treasure lands, the cultivation speed of these Eternal Dao Realms of the Terran Holy Kingdom will be much faster, and maybe in the future, some more half-step Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouses will be born.

With the passage of time, the Terran Holy Kingdom gradually stabilized in this area, and many Terran Eternal Dao Realms also left the Terran Holy Kingdom and began to trade around, and even went to other Eternal Realms to trade and explore.

At this time, Ye Tian didn't need to worry about the safety of these humans.

He was now ready to think for himself.

"I don't know if I can trade more Eternal Demon Pillars from the Realm God Realm, there should be a lot of Eternal Demon Pillars from the Realm God Realm Realm, if there are enough Eternal Demon Pillars, my cultivation speed will be faster!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Thinking about it, he was going to talk to the gods of the Old Sun Realm, after all, the Old Sun Mountain was a middle force in the Eastern Wu Realm, and the information he knew must be far beyond his, and there must be nothing wrong with his understanding.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian ran to the Old Day Mountain again.

At this moment, the God of the Old Sun Realm learned that Ye Tian was here again, and his injuries had not yet recovered, so he came out to greet Ye Tian, he was really afraid of Ye Tian.

......

"God of the Old Sun Realm, I came to you for some advice. "

Ye Tian got straight to the point.

"Ye Heavenly Realm God, please speak. The Old Sun Realm God hurriedly said.

"Do you know the Eternal Demon Pillar?" Ye Tian asked.

"Naturally, I know!" "The Old Sun Realm God nodded, "The Eternal Demon Pillar is a kind of treasure that can only be bred by the abyss of the Demon Seed, and it is actually an Eternal Demon Treasure, which is similar to the Eternal Realm Treasure, for the Demon Seed of the Eternal Realm God Realm, the Eternal Demon Pillar can temper their Demon Seed and increase their combat power." "

"There should be an Eternal Demon Pillar in the realm of the Realm God Kingdom, right?" Ye Tian said lightly.

"Yes, indeed!"

The Old Sun Realm God didn't know what Ye Tian meant by this, so he didn't continue to say it.

Ye Tian asked, "Where can I buy the Eternal Demon Pillar?"

"Buy the Eternal Demon Pillar?" The Old Sun Realm God was shocked, he didn't expect Ye Tian to actually buy this thing, what does the Eternal Realm God Realm want the Eternal Demon Pillar to do?

Unless it's to trade with the demon seed and get resources.

But trading with the demon seed, this is forbidden by the Realm Court, and once it is discovered, it will be dead!

Of course, if you don't find it, it's fine.

The Old Sun Realm God pondered for a while, and then said: "Ye Tian Realm God, the Eternal Demon Pillar is of little use to our Eternal Realm God Realm, only a few forces will collect the Eternal Demon Pillar to study, and it is not easy to buy the Eternal Demon Pillar." However, as far as I know, it seems that there is only one place where it is possible to acquire the Eternal Pillar!"

"Where?"

Ye Tian hurriedly asked.

"Mohe Valley!" the old realm god introduced: "Mohe Valley is one of the industries of the powerful Momen, which is located in a special treasure land, and if you cultivate there, you can even improve the Eternal Dao Seed by thirty percent, so it has attracted many realm gods, and Momen has even opened up Mohe Valley into a place of trading and started a business." Medium-sized forces like us in the old mountains will go to the Mohe Valley to trade and buy some items. "

Momen!

The strength of the Momen is very strong, much stronger than the middle forces.

It is said that there are more than 300 realm gods in Momen, of which there are sixteen in the middle level of the Eternal Realm God Realm, and one of them has condensed five Eternal Realm Spirits, but there is no Realm God who condenses six Eternal Realm Spirits.

But even so, this force is extremely terrifying.

In the Eternal Realm, you can't find so many middle-level powerhouses in the Eternal Realm God Realm!

And this is only one of the more than 100 powerful forces in the Eastern Wu Realm, not even the top forces.

And the Dongwu realm is not ranked in the realm of the god realm.

It can be said that Momen, which can be proud of the entire Eternal 463 Realm, is inconspicuous in the realm of the Realm God Realm.

Ye Tian came to the Realm God Realm for the first time, and when he learned a little about the strength of the Realm God Realm, he was shocked.

It is also very clear that in the realm of the gods, the current eternal realm is a small place, it is not worth mentioning, there is no difference between giving up and not giving up, but there can be no eternal realm, as long as the eternal realm is not completely destroyed.

After learning the information of the Momen River Valley from the Old Sun Realm God, Ye Tian was going to go to the Mo River Valley to see if he could collect some Eternal Demon Pillars.

......

Soon after.

Mohe Valley has arrived!

When Ye Tian came to the Mohe Valley, he found many realm gods, these realm gods came from other middle forces, and there were also some scattered cultivators.

Of course, the Mohe Valley was mainly those Eternal Dao Realms and half-step Eternal Realm Divine Realms, and the number of Eternal Realm Divine Realms was not large.

After coming here, Ye Tian first learned about Mohe Valley, and then began to inquire about information.

After that, Ye Tian had a count in his heart.

It is true that there are forces that have the Eternal Demon Pillar, but if you want to exchange it, you have to come up with some good things, otherwise people will not exchange it.

So, Ye Tian was going to take some treasures and exchange them for the Eternal Demon Pillar.
